text:
* Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of palm/malsync,
>
> Please note that PR ports/104006 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/104006

Sorry, forgot to

a) change mailaddress (submitter IS maintainer)
b) increase portrevision

-- 
By(t)e,
        Steve           /\          http://www.crashmail.de
